title: Implement the reusable SimpleBondV4 fuzz fixture and action driver
description: Add `test/helpers/simpleBondV4Fuzz.js` in CommonJS, extract the deployment/setup logic from `test/SimpleBondV4.test.js`, provision a challenger pool with approvals, register a default judge fee, and expose deterministic wrappers plus raw read helpers for create/challenge/ruling/withdraw/timeout flows.

title: Add reusable invariants on top of the fuzz fixture
description: Implement assertion helpers for token conservation, queue monotonicity, `currentChallenge` bounds, poster-win locked-bond behavior, and terminal balance outcomes using the new fixture's read layer.

title: Add bounded seeded fuzz-style tests for SimpleBondV4 core flows
description: Create a dedicated Hardhat test file that drives deterministic seeded action sequences through the fixture and invariants, covering sequential poster-win flows and terminal paths such as challenger win, concession, rejection, timeout, and withdrawal.

title: Verify helper integration, determinism, and runtime
description: Run the new fuzz test file and the existing `test/SimpleBondV4.test.js` suite, confirm failures are seed-reproducible, and tune seed count or helper behavior so the added coverage is practical for normal local and CI execution.
